mapper.select:
SELECT r.room_id as roomId, b.request_id as requestId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.business_id as businessId, r.bid_id as bidId, req.title as requestTitle, b.price as bidPrice, (SELECT content FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY send_at DESC LIMIT 1) as lastMessage, (SELECT send_at FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY send_at DESC LIMIT 1) as lastMessageTime,
(SELECT company_name FROM business WHERE business_id = r.business_id) as partnerName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = r.room_id AND sender_type = 'BUSINESS' AND is_read = 0) as unreadCount
(SELECT nickname FROM customer WHERE customer_id = r.customer_id) as partnerName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = r.room_id AND sender_type = 'CUSTOMER' AND is_read = 0) as unreadCount
FROM chat_room r JOIN bids b ON r.bid_id = b.bid_id JOIN request req ON b.request_id = req.request_id WHERE r.customer_id = #{userId} r.business_id = #{userId} ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC

SELECT r.room_id as roomId, b.request_id as requestId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.business_id as businessId, r.bid_id as bidId, req.title as requestTitle, b.price as bidPrice, (SELECT content FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY send_at DESC LIMIT 1) as lastMessage, (SELECT send_at FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY send_at DESC LIMIT 1) as lastMessageTime, concat((SELECT nickname FROM customer WHERE customer_id = r.customer_id), ' / ', (SELECT company_name FROM business WHERE business_id = r.business_id)) as partnerName, 0 as unreadCount FROM chat_room r JOIN bids b ON r.bid_id = b.bid_id JOIN request req ON b.request_id = req.request_id ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC

SELECT message_id as messageId, room_id as roomId, sender_id as senderId, sender_type as senderType, content, message_type as messageType, send_at as sendAt, is_read as isRead FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY send_at ASC

SELECT message_id as messageId, room_id as roomId, sender_id as senderId, sender_type as senderType, content, message_type as messageType, send_at as sendAt, is_read as isRead FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY send_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (room_id, sender_id, sender_type, content, message_type, send_at, is_read) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderType}, #{content}, #{messageType}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id as roomId, b.request_id as requestId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.business_id as businessId, r.bid_id as bidId FROM chat_room r JOIN bids b ON r.bid_id = b.bid_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT r.room_id as roomId, b.request_id as requestId, r.customer_id as customerId, r.business_id as businessId, r.bid_id as bidId FROM chat_room r JOIN bids b ON r.bid_id = b.bid_id WHERE r.bid_id = #{bidId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room (bid_id, customer_id, business_id, created_at) VALUES (#{bidId}, #{customerId}, #{businessId}, NOW())
